2022. universitat politécnica de catalunya 2021-2022 barcelona, spain m.sc. in aerospace science and technology. universitat de barcelona 2015-2020 barcelona, spain b.sc. physics (mention in fundamental physics). cmu penyafort-montserrat 2015-2018 barcelona, spain interdisciplinary college universitat rovira virgili 2013 - 2015 tarragona, spain advanced maths & physics of .b. excellence distinction. languages spanish: native catalan: native english: proficient skills coding languages fortran e python e atexe matlab astrophysics tools work experience kings college school teacher of physics jan 2021 to june 2021 soto de viuelas, madrid, spain physics and pshe teacher for year 7 to year 13, including a-levels and ib. freelance assistant teacher sept 2018 - sept 2020 online curses in bsc. physics and ba. business and preparation for selectividad. infervision europe data analyst and operations intern june 2018 - sept 2018 barcelona, spain strategy, operational set up and product deployment in spain market. surfer's bar bartender/cocktail barman june 2017 - aug 2017 and july 2021 - aug 2021 roda de bera, spain hawaiian-culture inspired bar and popular for its mojitos. research experience plume surface interaction mitigation challenge universitat politecnica de catalunya - european space agency feb 2022 to may 2022 pending review on acta astronautica. the goal of this project is to develop a mitigation solution for the ejected dust from landings on the moon. a landing pad surrounded by a structure to enhance the drag is proposed and comsol multiphysics simulations are performed to study the dynam- ics of the flow of dust to determine the optimal geometry of the solution. acoustic induced gas convection in microgravity european space agency academy, dropyourthesis! 2022 nov 2021 to date on process the project aims to enhance heat transfer in gases using acoustic fields in microgravity. cfd simulations using comsol multiphysics and mathematical modelling with for- tran will be done before the drops are performed in zarm drop tower, bremen. light pollution on astronomical observation universitat de barcelona starextractor saolmage ds9 + topcat feb 2021 to nov 2021 pending review on advances in space research. astrophysics e maxim dl simulation tools comsol + labview e dsmc e cad others elgra 1555' member of the european low gravity research association, jan 2022 conferences the goal of this project is to analyse how the mega-constellation of satellites starlink is reflecting light and how it effects astronomical observation, both amateur and sci- entific. we are using the software developed with s-extractor. optical tracking of leo satellites with s-extractor universitat de barcelona sept 2020 to feb 2021 pending review on advances in space research. the goal of this project is to develop a new way to solve the problems with optical recognition for long traces on astronomical images. the adaptation of the software allows us to detect orbiting objects when tracking leo satellites, such as space debris. + ath symposium on space educational orbital analysis of old, high latitude clusters activities, barcelona 2022. conference guest speaker. e saló de l'ensenyament, barcelona 2022. conference guest speaker. universitat de barcelona feb 2020 - june 2020 http: //diposit.ub.edu/dspace/handle/2445/171244 the goal of this study is to shed some light into the clusters b20 and b29 origin using orbital analysis.t he results indicate that these old, high latitude clusters have almost circular orbits around the galactic center which seem to confirm its disc origin.
